title: podman build: Inspect output of RUN command
body:
/kind feature I am unable to troubleshoot RUN issues during `podman build .`. There is no `--verbose` option to show output from the container. For `docker` there is an `--progress plain` option that is said to provide this functionality https://docs.docker.com/engine/reference/commandline/build/ **Output of `podman version`:** ``` 
Version:            1.8.1
RemoteAPI Version:  1
Go Version:         go1.13.6
OS/Arch:            linux/amd64
```

comments.body: Oops. My command in RUN failed to produce the output. `podman build .` does show the output.
